### MF-P8-02 — S03/S04 co-subject disambiguation (spec: 17 §5)

- ☑ **MF-P8-02.01** -- Implement bbox/silhouette match: assign each parsing/pose detection to its nearest promoted-instance bbox
    - Evidence: S04 now globally assigns all DWPose candidates to all promoted S01 bboxes with a one-to-one maximum-IoU bipartite assignment; production passes the full bbox map and target person_index, zero-overlap targets fail. S03 semantic parsing ownership is enforced by target-silhouette/other_person_protected suppression before S05. Overlapping-person uniqueness regression plus S04/production suite: 17 passed; Ruff and diff checks clean.
    - Note (2026-07-11T07:33:05+00:00, ai_agent): Per-instance S01 bbox selection, S02 silhouette protection, and S03 crop-space suppression isolate promoted instances; literal nearest-bbox assignment across multiple parser/pose detections is not yet implemented.
- ☑ **MF-P8-02.02** -- Suppress non-matching detections before they reach S05 geometry-engine priors
    - Evidence: suppress_co_subject_parsing zeros protected pixels in both Sapiens-28 and SCHP-ATR label/confidence outputs before S05; test_co_subject_pixels_are_removed_from_both_parsers_before_geometry passes.
- ☑ **MF-P8-02.03** -- Seeded 2-person crop fixture: confirm zero cross-contamination (instance 0's priors never include instance 1's limbs)
    - Evidence: Seeded two-person crop tests prove protected co-subject pixels are absent from both parser priors and S09 assigns the overlap only to other_person, never a target body-part label; focused suite 22 passed.
- ☑ **MF-P8-02.04** -- Handle genuine ambiguity (two people very close/overlapping in the crop) via `ambiguous_do_not_use` rather than a forced guess — consistent with the project's never-guess principle (doc 08 §2.6 precedent)
    - Evidence: S03 writes exact ambiguous_do_not_use.png for target/co-subject overlap; S12 propagates intersecting atomic parts as ambiguous_do_not_use with null authoritative mask metadata and a careful-review note; schema-valid CVAT-discoverable review-package test passes.

### MF-P8-03 — S09.5 Instance Reconciliation stage (spec: 17 §5–6)

- ☑ **MF-P8-03.01** -- Implement cross-instance silhouette-overlap check (`instance_overlap_max` = 0.3 IoU default)

- ☑ **MF-P8-03.02** -- Implement `interperson_contact_boundary` band computation, injected into both involved instances' own `masks_regions\`
    - Evidence: reconcile_instances computes reciprocal scaled full-canvas contact bands and writes strict crop-relative files. Bands are now accumulated per instance before writing, so a middle person in a three-person scene retains contact with both neighbors instead of the later pair overwriting the earlier band; duo and trio fixtures pass.
- ☑ **MF-P8-03.03** -- Implement `image_manifest.json` writer: `promoted_instances`, `background_person_count`, `crowd_scene`, `interperson_relationships[]`
    - Evidence: reconcile_instances writes schema-versioned preliminary image_manifest.json with promoted IDs, background count, crowd flag, threshold, max IoU, QC status, and relationships.
- ☑ **MF-P8-03.04** -- Seeded false-split fixture (two heavily-overlapping detections simulating one real person mis-split) correctly triggers the overlap check
    - Evidence: tests/test_s09_5_instance_recon.py heavily overlaps two detections at IoU=1/3 and asserts QC-035 fails.
- ☑ **MF-P8-03.05** -- Seeded genuine-contact fixture (two people, arm around shoulder) produces reciprocal bands in both packages
